On a failure, a target takes 18 (2d10 + 7) bludgeoning damage and is pushed 20 feet away from Gugalanna. On a success, a target takes half the damage and isn't pushed. Gugalanna can then fly up to half his flying speed.

legendary_actions.name: Blazing Sun Disc (Costs 2 Actions, Recharge 5-6)
legendary_actions.desc: The sun disc floating between Gugalanna's horns flares. Each creature within 30 feet of Gugalanna must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

special_abilities.name: Amorphous
special_abilities.desc: The gulon can move through a space as narrow as 1 foot wide without squeezing. When it moves through an area smaller than its normal space, it excretes waste in a 5-foot cube. This waste is difficult terrain and creatures crossing through it must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute.

special_abilities.name: Keen Smell
special_abilities.desc: The gulon has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The gulon makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Too Full (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The gulon belches a 15-foot-radius cloud of toxic gas around itself. Each creature in the area must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 31 (7d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

special_abilities.name: Shapechanger
special_abilities.desc: As a bonus action, the gumienniki can change its form into a Tiny housecat, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form except it loses its flaming hand scythe attack when in cat form.

special_abilities.name: Through Grass and Sheaves
special_abilities.desc: The gumienniki's speed is doubled when traveling over grassy areas or through planted crops.

actions.name: Flaming Hand Scythe
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) slashing damage and 7 (2d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Fiendish Blink (1/Day)
actions.desc: The gumienniki flashes its glowing eyes, illuminating a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area that can see the gumienniki must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute.

reactions.name: Taunting Cackle
reactions.desc: When the gumienniki is missed by an attack, it can taunt the attacker. The attacking creature must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on its next attack roll or saving throw.

creature.name: Gynosphinx
creature.damage_resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons

special_abilities.name: Inscrutable
special_abilities.desc: The sphinx is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the sphinx's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

special_abilities.name: Magic Weapons
special_abilities.desc: The sphinx's weapon attacks are magical.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The sphinx is a 9th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). It requires no material components to cast its spells. The sphinx has the following wizard spells prepared:

• Cantrips (at will): mage hand, minor illusion, prestidigitation
• 1st level (4 slots): detect magic, identify, shield
• 2nd level (3 slots): darkness, locate object, suggestion
• 3rd level (3 slots): dispel magic, remove curse, tongues
• 4th level (3 slots): banishment, greater invisibility
• 5th level (1 slot): legend lore

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The sphinx makes two claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.

legendary_actions.name: Claw Attack
legendary_actions.desc: The sphinx makes one claw attack.

legendary_actions.name: Teleport (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The sphinx magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

legendary_actions.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 3 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The sphinx casts a spell from its list of prepared spells, using a spell slot as normal.

creature.name: Gypsosphinx
creature.damage_resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

special_abilities.name: Death Sense
special_abilities.desc: The sphinx can pinpoint, by scent, the location of each creature below half its hp maximum within 60 feet of it, and it can sense the general direction of creatures that don't have all of their hp within 1 mile of it. In addition, the sphinx can foretell the age and manner of a creature's death by looking at it. This effect doesn't take into account possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the casting of powerful spells or the creature making a radical change in its life's path.

special_abilities.name: Inscrutable
special_abilities.desc: The sphinx is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the sphinx's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

special_abilities.name: Magic Weapons
special_abilities.desc: The sphinx's weapon attacks are magical.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The sphinx makes one Beak attack and two Claw attacks. If both Claw attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or take 14 (4d6) slashing damage and be knocked prone.

actions.name: Beak
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) slashing damage.

actions.name: Carrion Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The gypsosphinx exhales rotting breath in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) poison damage and 27 (6d8) necrotic damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. While poisoned in this way, a creature has disadvantage on death saving throws. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc:
The sphinx casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: comprehend languages, detect magic, mage hand
3/day each: blur, dispel magic, locate object
1/day each: major image, greater invisibility

legendary_actions.name: Beak Attack
legendary_actions.desc: The sphinx makes one Beak attack.

legendary_actions.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The sphinx uses Spellcasting.

legendary_actions.name: Teleport (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The sphinx magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

creature.name: Hair Golem
creature.damage_resistances: bludgeoning and piercing from nonmagical attacks not made with adamantine
creature.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned
creature.languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Immutable Form
special_abilities.desc: The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

actions.name: Lash
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) slashing damage. The target must succeed on a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone.

creature.name: Half-Red Dragon Veteran
creature.senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 12

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The veteran makes two longsword attacks. If it has a shortsword drawn, it can also make a shortsword attack.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Heavy Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d10 + 1) piercing damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The veteran exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

creature.name: Half-Shadow Dragon Assassin
creature.senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

special_abilities.name: Assassinate
special_abilities.desc: During the first turn of combat, the assassin has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasnt acted. On a successful hit, each creature of the assassins choice that can see the assassins attack is rattled until the end of the assassins next turn.

special_abilities.name: Dangerous Poison
special_abilities.desc: As part of making an attack, the assassin can apply a dangerous poison to their weapon (included below). The assassin carries 3 doses of this poison. A single dose can coat one melee weapon or up to 5 pieces of ammunition.

special_abilities.name: Evasion
special_abilities.desc: When the assassin makes a Dexterity saving throw against an effect that deals half damage on a success, they take no damage on a success and half damage on a failure.

special_abilities.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
special_abilities.desc: The assassin deals an extra 21 (6d6) damage when they hit with a weapon attack while they have advantage on the attack, or when the assassins target is within 5 feet of an ally of the assassin while the assassin doesnt have disadvantage on the attack.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

actions.name: Hand Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

actions.name: Anguished Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The assassin exhales a shadowy maelstrom of anguish in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw  taking 22 (4d8) necrotic damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

bonus_actions.name: Cunning Action
bonus_actions.desc: The assassin takes the Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object action.

bonus_actions.name: Rapid Attack
bonus_actions.desc: The assassin attacks with their shortsword.

creature.name: Hallowed Reed
creature.senses: blindsight 30 ft. (blind beyond this radius), passive Perception 14

special_abilities.name: Like Calls to Like
special_abilities.desc: The hallowed reed knows if a creature within 30 feet of it is good-aligned or not.

special_abilities.name: Limited Telepathy
special_abilities.desc: Using telepathy, a hallowed reed can magically communicate with any other good-aligned creature within 100 feet of it. This communication is primarily through images and emotions rather than actual words.

special_abilities.name: Rebirth
special_abilities.desc: If a hallowed reed is slain, a new patch of hallowed reeds will grow in the same spot starting within a week of its death. Charring or salting the ground where a hallowed reed was slain prevents this resurgence.

actions.name: Searing Grasp
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 15 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) radiant damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, it takes 2 (1d4) radiant damage at the start of each of its turns, and the hallowed reed can't grasp another target. Undead and fiends have disadvantage on ability checks made to escape the grapple.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The harpy makes two attacks: one with its claws and one with its club.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) slashing damage.

actions.name: Club
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Luring Song
actions.desc:
The harpy sings a magical melody. Every humanoid and giant within 300 ft. of the harpy that can hear the song must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the song ends. The harpy must take a bonus action on its subsequent turns to continue singing. It can stop singing at any time. The song ends if the harpy is incapacitated.
While charmed by the harpy, a target is incapacitated and ignores the songs of other harpies. If the charmed target is more than 5 ft. away from the harpy, the must move on its turn toward the harpy by the most direct route. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the harpy, a target can repeat the saving throw. A creature can also repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the effect ends on it.
A target that successfully saves is immune to this harpy's song for the next 24 hours.

creature.name: Haugbui
creature.damage_resistances: acid, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, thunder
creature.damage_immunities: poison; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creature.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, restrained
creature.languages: the languages it knew in life, telepathy 120 ft.

special_abilities.name: Incorporeal Movement
special_abilities.desc: The haugbui can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the haugbui has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

special_abilities.name: Turn Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The haugbui has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

special_abilities.name: Undead Nature
special_abilities.desc: The hangbui doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The haugbui makes three Psychic Blast attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Psychic Blast
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +10 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (5d8 + 5) psychic damage.

actions.name: Invisibility
actions.desc: The haugbui magically turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the haugbui wears or carries is invisible with it.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc:
The haugbui casts one of the following spells, requiring no components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):
At will: dancing lights, mending, purify food and drink, spare the dying
3/day each: gust of wind, telekinesis
1/day each: dispel magic, remove curse

bonus_actions.name: Sepulchral Scrying (Recharge 6)
bonus_actions.desc: While within 1 mile of its burial mound, the haugbui creates an invisible sensor within 5 miles of the mound for 1 minute. When it uses this bonus action and as a bonus action on each of its turns for the duration, the haugbui can switch between using its own senses and projecting its senses through the sensor. While projecting its senses through the sensor, it can see, hear, telepathically communicate, and cast spells as if it was in the sensor's space, and it is blinded and deafened with regard to its own senses. The sensor can be dispelled (DC 14).

special_abilities.name: Ancestral Spirits
special_abilities.desc: Three ghostly spirits haunt the giant. The spirits are incorporeal, remain within 10 feet of the giant at all times, and can't take actions. Each uses the giant's AC and saving throws, has 15 hp and can only be harmed by radiant damage. If an ancestral spirit is reduced to 0 hp, it disappears temporarily. Reduce the giant's AC by 1 and remove one trait granted by the spirits for each spirit that is driven off. Ancestral spirits can't be turned.

special_abilities.name: Reckless
special_abilities.desc: At the start of its turn, the giant can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

special_abilities.name: See Invisibility
special_abilities.desc: The giant can see invisible creatures and objects as if they were visible and can see into the Ethereal Plane. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

special_abilities.name: Steadfast
special_abilities.desc: The giant is immune to the charmed and frightened conditions. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The giant makes two greatclub attacks.

actions.name: Greatclub
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Rock
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

special_abilities.name: Keen Sight
special_abilities.desc: The hawk has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

actions.name: Talons
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.

special_abilities.name: Heightened Sight
special_abilities.desc: The hawk's Perception is 19 when perceiving by sight.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The hawk has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the hawk's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Beak
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Evasive Flight
bonus_actions.desc: The hawk takes the Disengage or Dodge action. It can use this bonus action only while flying.

special_abilities.name: Cavalry Charge
special_abilities.desc: If the dragonborn moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature while mounted and then hits with a lance attack on the same turn, it can make a trample attack against that creature as a bonus action.

special_abilities.name: Locked Saddle
special_abilities.desc: The dragonborn can't be knocked prone, dismounted, or moved against its will while mounted.

special_abilities.name: Mounted Warrior
special_abilities.desc: The dragonborn is rarely seen without its giant lizard mount. The lizard wears custom scale mail that raises its Armor Class to 15. While the dragonborn is mounted, the giant lizard can't be charmed or frightened.

actions.name: Lance
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d12 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Heavy Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d10 + 1) piercing damage.

actions.name: Trample (Mounted Only)
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
actions.desc: The dragonborn breathes fire in a 15-foot cone. All creatures in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

creature.name: Hell Hound
creature.languages: understands Infernal but can't speak it

special_abilities.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
special_abilities.desc: The hound has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The hound has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The hound exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

special_abilities.name: Blood Armor
special_abilities.desc: Each time a creature with blood hits the herald with a melee attack while within 10 feet of the herald, the creature takes 4 (1d8) necrotic damage, and the herald's AC increases by 1 until the end of its next turn. The herald's AC can't be increased to more than 20 from this trait.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The herald makes three Herald's Staff or Blood Bolt attacks, or it makes two Herald's Staff attacks and one Grasping Slam attack.

actions.name: Herald's Staff
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Grasping Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17) if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and takes 9 (2d8) necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns, and the herald can't use its Grasping Slam on another target.

actions.name: Blood Bolt
actions.desc: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (5d8 + 3) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature with blood, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Call Blood (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Each creature with blood within 10 feet of the herald must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The herald then gains temporary hp equal to the single highest amount of necrotic damage dealt. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more also suffers one level of exhaustion.

bonus_actions.name: Grant Blood Rage
bonus_actions.desc: The herald of blood infuses reckless rage in one creature it can see within 60 feet of it that isn't a Construct or Undead. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be enraged for a number of rounds equal to the target's Constitution modifier. While enraged, the target has advantage on all melee attack rolls, and attack rolls against it have advantage. When the rage ends, the target takes 13 (3d8) necrotic damage and suffers one level of exhaustion. A creature with any levels of exhaustion automatically succeeds on this saving throw.

special_abilities.name: Made of Shadows (Shadow Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: The herald of darkness has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage and can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. In addition, it can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

special_abilities.name: Shadow's Sight
special_abilities.desc: Magical darkness doesn't impede the herald's darkvision.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The herald of darkness makes two Embrace Darkness or Shadow Sword attacks.

actions.name: Embrace Darkness (Shadow Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Spell Attack: +7 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the herald's space. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Shadow Sword (Fiend Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Majesty of the Abyss (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The herald of darkness emits a sinister burst of infernal power. Each creature within 15 feet of the herald and that can see it must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 27 (6d8) necrotic damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more is also paralyzed until the end of its next turn. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

bonus_actions.name: Shadow Shape
bonus_actions.desc: The herald magically transforms into a Large shadow or back into its true form, which is a Fiend. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

creature.name: Hezrou
creature.damage_resistances: cold, fire, lightning; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The hezrou has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Stench
special_abilities.desc: Any creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the hezrou must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the hezrou's stench for 24 hours.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hezrou makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Variant: Summon Demon (1/Day)
actions.desc:
The demon chooses what to summon and attempts a magical summoning.
A hezrou has a 30 percent chance of summoning 2d6 dretches or one hezrou.
A summoned demon appears in an unoccupied space within 60 feet of its summoner, acts as an ally of its summoner, and can't summon other demons. It remains for 1 minute, until it or its summoner dies, or until its summoner dismisses it as an action.

creature.name: Hierophant Lich
creature.damage_immunities: poison; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Levitate
special_abilities.desc: As a bonus action, a hierophant lich can rise or descend vertically up to 20 feet and can remain suspended there. This trait works like the levitate spell, except there is no duration, and the lich doesn't need to concentrate to continue levitating each round.

special_abilities.name: Rejuvenation
special_abilities.desc: If it has a sacred vessel, a destroyed hierophant lich gains a new body in 1d10 days, regaining all its hp and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of the vessel.

special_abilities.name: Turn Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The hierophant lich has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The lich is an 9th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). The lich has the following cleric spells prepared:
Cantrips (at will): guidance, mending, sacred flame, thaumaturgy
1st level (4 slots): command, detect magic, protection from evil and good, sanctuary
2nd level (3 slots): blindness/deafness, hold person, silence
3rd level (3 slots): animate dead, dispel magic, spirit guardians
4th level (3 slots): banishment, freedom of movement, guardian of faith
5th level (1 slot): flame strike

actions.name: Unholy Smite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d6 + 1) bludgeoning plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. The charmed target must defend the hierophant. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. An undead target that fails is charmed for 24 hours and can only repeat the saving throw once every 24 hours.

legendary_actions.name: Cantrip
legendary_actions.desc: The hierophant lich casts a cantrip.

legendary_actions.name: Unholy Smite (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The heirophant lich uses its Unholy Smite.

legendary_actions.name: Damnation (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The hierophant lich threatens one creature within 10 feet of it with eternal suffering. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to the hierophant lich's Damnation for the next 24 hours.

actions.name: Rapier
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.

actions.name: Ray of Frost (Cantrip; V, S)
actions.desc: Ranged Spell Attack: +4 to hit, range 60 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d8) cold damage  and the targets Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the nobles next turn.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.desc: If the noble is wielding a melee weapon and can see their attacker, they add 2 to their AC against one melee attack that would hit them.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The priest is an 11th level spellcaster. Their spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15
 +7 to hit with spell attacks). They have the following cleric spells prepared:
 Cantrips (at will): light
 sacred flame
 thaumaturgy
 1st-level (4 slots): ceremony
 detect evil and good
 healing word
 2nd-level (3 slots): augury
 hold person
 zone of truth
 3rd-level (3 slots): daylight
 remove curse
 4th-level (3 slots): divination
 guardian of faith
 revivify
 5th-level (2 slots): flame strike
 greater restoration
 raise dead
 6th-level (1 slots): heal

actions.name: Mace
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage. On a hit  the priest can expend a spell slot to deal 7 (2d6) radiant damage  plus an extra 3 (1d6) radiant damage for each level of the spell slot expended above 1st.

actions.name: Sacred Flame (Cantrip; V, S)
actions.desc: One creature the priest can see within 60 feet makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 13 (3d8) radiant damage on a failure. This spell ignores cover.

actions.name: Hold Person (2nd-Level; V, S, M, Concentration)
actions.desc: One humanoid the priest can see within 60 feet makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the target is paralyzed for 1 minute. The target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

actions.name: Guardian of Faith (4th-Level; V)
actions.desc: A Large  indistinct spectral guardian appears in an unoccupied space within 30 feet and remains for 8 hours. Creatures of the priests choice that move to a space within 10 feet of the guardian for the first time on a turn make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 20 radiant or necrotic damage (high priests choice) on a failed save or half damage on a success. The spell ends when the guardian has dealt 60 total damage.

actions.name: Flame Strike (5th-Level; V, S, M)
actions.desc: A column of divine flame fills a 10-foot-radius  40-foot-high cylinder within 60 feet. Creatures in the area make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 14 (4d6) fire damage and 14 (4d6) radiant damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

bonus_actions.name: Healing Word (1st-Level; V)
bonus_actions.desc: The priest or a living creature within 60 feet regains 6 (1d4 + 4) hit points. The priest can't cast this spell and a 1st-level or higher spell on the same turn.

special_abilities.name: Unarmored Defense
special_abilities.desc: The pugilists AC equals 10 + their Dexterity modifier + their Wisdom modifier.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The pugilist attacks three times with their fists.

actions.name: Fists
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Grab
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage  and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends  the pugilist can't grapple a different target.

actions.name: Pin
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one grappled creature. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage  and the target is restrained until the grapple ends.

actions.name: Body Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one grappled creature. Hit: 20 (5d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage  and the grapple ends.

reactions.name: Opportune Jab
reactions.desc: If a creature attempts to grapple the pugilist, the pugilist attacks that creature with their fists.

bonus_actions.name: Haymaker (1/Day)
bonus_actions.desc: The pugilist attacks with their fists. On a hit, the attack deals an extra 7 (2d6) damage.

bonus_actions.name: Head Shot (1/Day)
bonus_actions.desc: The pugilist attacks with their fists. On a hit, the target makes a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it is stunned until the end of the pugilists next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The giant makes two greatclub attacks.

actions.name: Greatclub
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Rock
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

special_abilities.name: Gullible
special_abilities.desc: The giant makes Insight checks with disadvantage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The giant attacks twice with its greatclub.

actions.name: Greatclub
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature  it makes a DC 16 Strength saving throw  falling prone on a failure.

actions.name: Rock
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (6d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature  it makes a DC 16 Strength saving throw  falling prone on a failure. In lieu of a rock  the giant can throw a grappled Medium or smaller creature up to 30 feet. On a hit  the target and the thrown creature both take 15 (3d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage. On a miss  only the thrown creature takes the damage. The thrown creature falls prone in an unoccupied space 5 feet from the target.

actions.name: Greatclub Sweep (1/Day, While Bloodied)
actions.desc: Each creature within 10 feet makes a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure  a creature takes 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage  is pushed 10 feet away from the giant  and falls prone.

bonus_actions.name: Grab
bonus_actions.desc: One creature within 5 feet makes a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, it is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the giant can't grab another target, and it makes greatclub attacks with advantage against the grappled target.

bonus_actions.name: Body Slam (1/Day)
bonus_actions.desc: The giant jumps up to 15 feet horizontally without provoking opportunity attacks and falls prone in a space containing one or more creatures. Each creature in its space when it lands makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage and falling prone on a failure. On a success, the creature takes half damage and is pushed 5 feet to an unoccupied space of its choice. If that space is occupied, the creature falls prone.

bonus_actions.name: Muddy Ground (1/Day)
bonus_actions.desc: Areas of unworked earth within 60 feet magically become swampy mud for 1 minute or until the giant dies. These areas become difficult terrain. Prone creatures in the area when the mud appears or that fall prone in the area make a DC 15 Strength saving throw. On a failure, the creatures Speed drops to 0 as it becomes stuck in the mud. A creature can use its action to make a DC 15 Strength check, freeing itself on a success.

bonus_actions.name: Stomp (1/Day)
bonus_actions.desc: The giant stamps its foot, causing the ground to tremble. Each creature within 60 feet makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, it falls prone.

special_abilities.name: Earth Glide
special_abilities.desc: The hinn can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the hinn doesn't disturb the material through which it moves.

special_abilities.name: Nebulous (Cloud Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: The hinn's Stealth is 20, it can hover while flying, can't manipulate objects or attack, and it can pass through any space air can pass through without squeezing. In addition, it can enter and hide in any Tiny or larger container, such as a pouch, lamp, backpack, or barrel.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hinn makes three Gem-Studded Mace or Lob Stone attacks. If two Gem-Studded Mace attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 16 CON save or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Gem-Studded Mace
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 13 (2d6+6) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) piercing damage.

actions.name: Lob Stone
actions.desc: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +10 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 22 (3d10+6) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Create Earth Elemental (1/Day)
actions.desc: The hinn magically creates one earth-based Elemental of CR 5 or lower in an unoccupied space the hinn can see within 30 feet of it. The elemental acts as an ally of the hinn, obeying its spoken commands. The elemental remains for 1 hour, until the hinn dies, or until the hinn dismisses it as a bonus action.

actions.name: Travel the Planes (1/Day)
actions.desc: The hinn transports itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except it can affect only itself and can't use this action to banish an unwilling creature.

bonus_actions.name: Churned Earth
bonus_actions.desc: The hinn causes the ground on a point it can see within 60 feet of it to erupt. Each creature within 15 feet of that point must succeed on a DC 16 DEX save or take 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone.

bonus_actions.name: Genie Shape
bonus_actions.desc: The hinn magically transforms into a Medium cloud of dust filled with miniscule clashing, bursting, and reforming rocks or back into its bipedal form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its bipedal form if it dies. The hinn can't use this bonus action to transform into its bipedal form while inside a Medium or smaller container.

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: The hippocampus can breathe air and water.

special_abilities.name: Shared Breath
special_abilities.desc: The hippocampus's gills pull more air from the water than the hippocampus needs, expelling the excess as bubbles down its neck and across its back. If an air-breathing creature is riding the hippocampus, these bubbles can provide that creature a supply of fresh air when the hippocampus isn't in combat or traveling at a fast pace.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hippocampus makes one Bite attack and one Tail Slap attack.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 7 (1d6+4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Tail Slap
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 8 (1d8+4) bludgeoning damage.

bonus_actions.name: Rearing Kick
bonus_actions.desc: The hippocampus rears up and kicks its forelegs at one creature it can see within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 14 STR save or be knocked prone or pushed up to 10 feet away from the hippocampus (the hippocampus's choice).

special_abilities.name: Keen Sight
special_abilities.desc: The hippogriff has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hippogriff makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.

actions.name: Beak
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage.

creature.name: Hivebound
creature.senses: keensense 60 ft. (can't sense beyond this radius)

special_abilities.name: Collective Mind
special_abilities.desc: The hivebound's individual insects and swarms under its control are connected via a hive mind. It can telepathically communicate with any of its individual insects and swarms within 1 mile of it, and it can't be surprised. It can have up to five swarms of insects under its control at a time.

special_abilities.name: Monstrosity Resilience
special_abilities.desc: The hivebound is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

special_abilities.name: Reinforced Mind
special_abilities.desc: If the hivebound starts its turn afflicted by an ongoing effect that allows a repeated INT, WIS, or CHA save to end the effect, such as the hold spell, the hivebound can make the save at the start of the turn instead of the end and has advantage on the save.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hivebound makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks, or it makes three Spit Insect attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 12 (2d8+3) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 8 (2d4+3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Spit Insect
actions.desc: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d4+3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 DEX save or be pestered until the end of its next turn. A pestered creature has disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the pester ends.

actions.name: Swarm Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The hivebound exhales stinging insects in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 DEX save, taking 10 (4d4) piercing damage and 17 (5d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A swarm of insects under the hivebound's control then forms in an unoccupied space in that area.

bonus_actions.name: Swift Flight
bonus_actions.desc: The hivebound flies up to half its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

creature.name: Hoard Golem
creature.damage_immunities: poison, psychic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks not made with adamantine weapons
creature.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned
creature.languages: understands the languages of its creator but can’t speak

special_abilities.name: Construct Nature
special_abilities.desc: The golem doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

special_abilities.name: Enchanted Weapons
special_abilities.desc: The golem's weapon attacks are magical. When the golem hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 4d8 force damage (included in the attack).

special_abilities.name: Immutable Form
special_abilities.desc: The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The golem has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Strike with Awe
special_abilities.desc: A creature that enters a space within 120 feet of the hoard golem or starts its turn there must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks while it remains within 120 feet of the golem.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hoard golem makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) force damage.

actions.name: Thieving Whirlwind (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The hoard golem partially disperses into a whirlwind of coins, gemstones, and other valuables then recoalesces. Each creature within 20 feet of the golem must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 44 (8d10) bludgeoning damage and loses one object it is wearing or carrying. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't lose an object. Each object the golem steals must weigh no more than 20 pounds and not be wrapped around or firmly attached to a creature. For example, the golem could steal a belt pouch full of coins or a creature's jewel-encrusted dagger, but it can't steal a creature's shirt or armor. The hoard golem steals objects of high value over those of minimal value. The stolen object becomes part of the golem's body and can't be retrieved until the golem dies.

special_abilities.name: Martial Advantage
special_abilities.desc: Once per turn, the hobgoblin can deal an extra 7 (2d6) damage to a creature it hits with a weapon attack if that creature is within 5 ft. of an ally of the hobgoblin that isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) slashing damage, or 6 (1d10 + 1) slashing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Formation Movement
special_abilities.desc: If the hobgoblin begins its turn within 5 feet of an ally that is not incapacitated, its movement doesnt provoke opportunity attacks.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hobgoblin attacks twice with its greatsword.

actions.name: Greatsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Officers Command (1/Day)
actions.desc: The hobgoblin inspires creatures of its choice within 30 feet that can hear and understand it and that have a Challenge Rating of 2 or lower. For the next minute  inspired creatures gain an expertise die on attack rolls and saving throws. A creature can benefit from only one Officers Command at a time.

special_abilities.name: Unshakable Command
special_abilities.desc: Each friendly creature within 30 feet of the hobgoblin commander can't be charmed or frightened while the commander isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hobgoblin commander makes three Greatsword or Longbow attacks.

actions.name: Greatsword
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 9 (2d6+2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 6 (1d8+2) piercing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Martial Tactics
bonus_actions.desc:
The hobgoblin commander employs one of the following tactics:
- **Emboldening Shout.** One friendly creature within 30 feet of the hobgoblin commander that it can see gains 7 (2d6) temporary HP until the start of the commander's next turn.
- **Pressing Advance.** The commander moves up to half its speed and commands one friendly creature it can see within 30 feet of it to also move. The target can use its reaction to move up to half its speed in the direction of the commander's choosing. This movement for both creatures is unaffected by difficult terrain and doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

special_abilities.name: Formation Movement
special_abilities.desc: If the hobgoblin begins its turn within 5 feet of an ally that is not incapacitated, its movement doesnt provoke opportunity attacks.

special_abilities.name: Bloodied Rage
special_abilities.desc: While bloodied, the warlord can attack four times with its greatsword or twice with its javelin when it uses Multiattack but no longer gains the benefit of its Military Training trait.

special_abilities.name: Elite Recovery
special_abilities.desc: At the end of each of its turns, while bloodied, the hobgoblin can end one condition or effect on itself. It can do this even when unconscious or incapacitated.

special_abilities.name: Military Training
special_abilities.desc: The hobgoblin has advantage on ability checks to make a tactical, strategic, or political decision.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hobgoblin attacks twice with its greatsword.

actions.name: Greatsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Officers Command (1/Day)
actions.desc: The hobgoblin inspires creatures of its choice within 30 feet that can hear and understand it and that have a Challenge Rating of 2 or lower. For the next minute  inspired creatures gain an expertise die on attack rolls and saving throws. A creature can benefit from only one Officers Command at a time.

special_abilities.name: Aura of Courage
special_abilities.desc: While the knight is conscious, allies within 10 feet are immune to being frightened.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The knight attacks twice with their greatsword.

actions.name: Greatsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage plus 5 (2d8) radiant damage.

actions.name: Lance (Mounted Only)
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d12 + 3) piercing damage. If the knight moves at least 20 feet straight towards the target before the attack  they deal an extra 13 (2d12) piercing damage  and the target makes a DC 14 Strength saving throw  falling prone on a failure. This attack is made at disadvantage against targets within 5 feet.

actions.name: Lay On Hands (1/Day)
actions.desc: The knight touches a willing creature or themself and restores 30 hit points.

actions.name: Knightly Inspiration (1/Day)
actions.desc: The knight inspires creatures of their choice within 30 feet that can hear and understand them. For the next minute  inspired creatures gain an expertise die (1d4) on attack rolls and saving throws. A creature can benefit from only one Knightly Inspiration at a time  and the knight cannot target themselves.

creature.name: Homunculus
creature.languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Telepathic Bond
special_abilities.desc: While the homunculus is on the same plane of existence as its master, it can magically convey what it senses to its master, and the two can communicate telepathically.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target is instead poisoned for 5 (1d10) minutes and unconscious while poisoned in this way.

creature.name: Horakh
creature.senses: darkvision 60 ft., tremorsense 30 ft., passive Perception 20

special_abilities.name: Implant Egg
special_abilities.desc: If the horakh reduces a creature to 0 hp with a Bite attack or as a bonus action while within 5 feet of a creature with 0 hp, the horakh can implant an egg in the creature. The implanted egg rests in the creature's eye socket for 14 days while it incubates. A host creature can carry only one horakh egg to term at a time. While the egg is implanted, the host can't use its eye and has disadvantage on attack rolls and on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight. Exactly 24 hours before the egg hatches, the host becomes blinded. When the egg hatches, the young horakh erupts from the host's head, killing the host in the process.

special_abilities.name: Standing Leap
special_abilities.desc: The horakh's long jump is up to 30 feet and its high jump is up to 15 feet, with or without a running start.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The horakh makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) piercing damage. If the horakh scores a critical hit, it removes one of the target's eyes, provided the target has eyes, and places the eye in a fluid sac on its thorax. While missing half or less of its total number of eyes, the target has disadvantage on attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight. While missing more than half its total number of eyes, the target is blinded until its sight is restored.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) slashing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Shadow Stealth
bonus_actions.desc: While in dim light or darkness, the horakh takes the Hide action.

creature.name: Horde Demon
creature.damage_resistances: cold, fire, lightning; damage from nonmagical weapons

special_abilities.name: Chaotic Evil
special_abilities.desc: The demon radiates a Chaotic and Evil aura.

special_abilities.name: Radiant Weakness
special_abilities.desc: If the demon takes radiant damage while it is bloodied, it is frightened for 1 minute.

special_abilities.name: Varied Shapes
special_abilities.desc: Each horde demon has a unique combination of attacks and powers. Roll 1d10 once or twice, rerolling duplicates, or choose one or two features from the following table. A horde demons features determine the attacks it can make.

special_abilities.name: 1 Bat Head
special_abilities.desc: The demon emits a 15-foot cone of cacophonous sound. Each creature in the area makes a DC 12 Constitution saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) thunder damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

special_abilities.name: 2 Bulging Eyes (Gaze)
special_abilities.desc: A creature within 60 feet makes a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it takes 7 (2d6) psychic damage and is frightened until the end of its next turn.

special_abilities.name: 3 Claws
special_abilities.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) slashing damage.

special_abilities.name: 4 Fangs
special_abilities.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: 5 Goat Horns
special_abilities.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage and the target makes a DC 13 Strength saving throw, falling prone on a failure.

special_abilities.name: 6 Lamprey Mouth
special_abilities.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the lamprey mouth attack can be used only on this target and automatically hits.

special_abilities.name: 7 Porcupine Quills
special_abilities.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: 8 Scorpion Tail Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft
special_abilities.desc: , one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

special_abilities.name: 9 Tentacle Arms Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 15 ft
special_abilities.desc: , one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the tentacle arms attack can only be used on this target.

special_abilities.name: 10 Whispering Mouth
special_abilities.desc: The demon targets a creature within 30 feet that can hear it. The target makes a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it takes 7 (1d8 + 3) psychic damage and is magically cursed until the start of the demons next turn. While cursed, the demons attacks against the target are made with advantage, and the target has disadvantage on saving throws against the demons Whispering Mouth.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The demon makes two attacks  using any attack granted by its Varied Shapes trait.

creature.name: Horde Demon Band
creature.damage_resistances: cold, fire, lightning; damage from nonmagical weapons

special_abilities.name: Area Vulnerability
special_abilities.desc: The band takes double damage from any effect that targets an area.

special_abilities.name: Chaotic Evil
special_abilities.desc: The band radiates a Chaotic and Evil aura.

special_abilities.name: Band
special_abilities.desc: The band is composed of 5 or more horde demons. If it is subjected to a spell, attack, or other effect that affects only one target, it takes any damage but ignores other effects. It can share its space with Medium or smaller creatures or objects. The band can move through any opening large enough for one Medium creature without squeezing.

special_abilities.name: Band Dispersal
special_abilities.desc: When the band is reduced to 0 hit points, it turns into 2 (1d4) horde demons with 26 hit points each.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The band attacks twice.

actions.name: Mob Attack
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 50 (10d6 + 15) slashing damage  or half damage if the band is bloodied.

creature.name: Horde of Shadows
creature.damage_resistances: acid, cold, fire, lightning, thunder; damage from nonmagical weapons
creature.condition_immunities: charmed, fatigue, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained

special_abilities.name: Amorphous
special_abilities.desc: The horde can pass through an opening as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

special_abilities.name: Area Vulnerability
special_abilities.desc: The horde takes double damage from any effect that targets an area.

special_abilities.name: Horde Dispersal
special_abilities.desc: When the horde is reduced to 0 hit points, it turns into 2 (1d4) shadows, each of which are bloodied.

special_abilities.name: Horde
special_abilities.desc: The horde is composed of 5 or more shadows. If it is subjected to a spell, attack, or other effect that affects only one target, it takes any damage but ignores other effects. It can share its space with Medium or smaller creatures or objects.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Weakness
special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the horde has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

special_abilities.name: Undead Nature
special_abilities.desc: The horde doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The horde makes up to three claw attacks  but no more than one against each target.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 16 (4d6 + 2) necrotic damage  and the target makes a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  the target is cursed until it finishes a short or long rest or is the subject of remove curse or a similar spell. While cursed  the target makes attack rolls  Strength checks  and Strength saving throws with disadvantage. If the target dies while cursed  a new undead shadow rises from the corpse in 1d4 hours  the corpse no longer casts a natural shadow  and the target can't be raised from the dead until the new shadow is destroyed.

bonus_actions.name: Shadow Sneak
bonus_actions.desc: The horde takes the Hide action even if obscured only by dim light or darkness.

creature.name: Horned Devil
creature.damage_resistances: cold; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons that aren't silvered

special_abilities.name: Devil's Sight
special_abilities.desc: Magical darkness doesn't impede the devil's darkvision.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The devil makes three melee attacks: two with its fork and one with its tail. It can use Hurl Flame in place of any melee attack.

actions.name: Fork
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d8 + 6) piercing damage. If the target is a creature other than an undead or a construct, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or lose 10 (3d6) hit points at the start of each of its turns due to an infernal wound. Each time the devil hits the wounded target with this attack, the damage dealt by the wound increases by 10 (3d6). Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 12 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.

actions.name: Hurl Flame
actions.desc: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 150 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it also catches fire.

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: The horned serpent can breathe air and water.

special_abilities.name: Corpse Cough
special_abilities.desc: Those who fail a saving throw against the horned serpent's Gem Gaze or bite attack become infected with the corpse cough disease. The infected creature can't benefit from short or long rests due to a constant, wet cough. The infected creature must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw each day or take 18 (4d8) necrotic damage. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. The reduction lasts until the target is cured of the disease with a greater restoration spell or similar magic. If the infected creature comes into physical contact with a blood relative before the disease is cured, the relative must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or also become infected with the disease. The blood relative is afflicted with a constant, wet cough within hours of infection, but the disease's full effects don't manifest until 1d4 days later. Corpse cough is so named due to the smell of the cough as the infected creature's lungs become necrotic.

special_abilities.name: Poisonous Aura
special_abilities.desc: At the start of each of the horned serpent's turns, each creature within 20 feet of it must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

special_abilities.name: Shielded Mind
special_abilities.desc: The horned serpent is immune to scrying and to any effect that would sense its emotions, read its thoughts, or detect its location.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The horned serpent makes one gore attack and one bite attack.

actions.name: Gore
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) piercing damage.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or become infected with the corpse cough disease (see the Corpse Cough trait).

actions.name: Gem Gaze (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The horned serpent's gem flashes, bathing a 30-foot cone in iridescent light. Each creature in the area must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 35 (10d6) radiant damage and is infected with the corpse cough disease (see the Corpse Cough trait). On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't infected with the disease. Gem Gaze has no effect on constructs and undead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The centaur attacks with its pike and its hooves.

actions.name: Gore
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage  or 10 (2d6 + 3) damage if the centaur moved at least 30 feet towards the target before the attack.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage. If this attack deals damage  the centaurs movement doesnt provoke opportunity attacks from the target for the rest of the centaurs turn.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Deadeye Shot (1/Day)
actions.desc: The centaur makes a shortbow attack with advantage.

special_abilities.name: Draft Animal
special_abilities.desc: The draft horse can push, drag, or lift weight in pounds equal to three times its carrying capacity.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 7 (1d6+4) bludgeoning damage.

special_abilities.name: Easy Gait
special_abilities.desc: The horse's steps are smooth and steady. A creature riding the horse has advantage on saves against exhaustion caused by a Forced March.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 6 (1d6+3) bludgeoning damage.

special_abilities.name: Trampling Charge
special_abilities.desc: If the horse moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Hooves attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 STR save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the horse can make another Hooves attack against it as a bonus action.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 8 (1d8+4) bludgeoning damage.

reactions.name: Trained Shift
reactions.desc: If the horse's rider is subjected to an effect that would knock it prone or dismount it, the horse can shift its body to assist the rider. The rider has advantage on the check or save to avoid the effect.

creature.name: Hound Guardian
creature.damage_immunities: poison; damage from nonmagical, non-adamantine weapons
creature.condition_immunities: charmed, fatigue, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned
creature.languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Immutable Form
special_abilities.desc: The guardian is immune to any effect that would alter its form.

special_abilities.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
special_abilities.desc: The guardian has advantage on Perception checks that rely on hearing or smell.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The guardian has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Constructed Nature
special_abilities.desc: Guardians dont require air, sustenance, or sleep.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature  it makes a DC 13 Strength saving throw  falling prone on a failure.

reactions.name: Protective Bite
reactions.desc: When a creature within 5 feet hits the guardians owner with a melee attack, the guardian bites the attacker.

creature.name: Hound of the Night
creature.languages: understands Elvish and Umbral but can’t speak

special_abilities.name: Fey Scent
special_abilities.desc: The hound of the night has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell. If it is tracking a Fey, Giant, or Humanoid whose scent it knows, the hound can continue tracking that creature if the creature moves into the Border Ethereal or teleports, provided the creature isn't in the Border Ethereal for more than 1 minute or that the creature doesn't teleport more than 100 feet at a time.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hound of the night makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) cold damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

actions.name: Frost Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The hound exhales frost in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 27 (6d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

actions.name: Teleport (Recharge 4-6)
actions.desc: The hound magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Before or after teleporting, the hound can make one Bite attack.

special_abilities.name: Entrance by Corners
special_abilities.desc: The hound of Tindalos may only enter the Material Plane at a sharp intersection of surfaces. As a bonus action, the hound can teleport from one location to another within sight of the first, provided it travels from one sharp corner to another.

special_abilities.name: Keen Smell
special_abilities.desc: The hound of Tindalos has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely smell.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The hound of Tindalos has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Pounce
special_abilities.desc: If the hound of Tindalos moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the hound of Tindalos can make one tongue attack against it as a bonus action.

special_abilities.name: Slippery
special_abilities.desc: The hound of Tindalos has advantage on ability checks and saving throws made to escape a grapple.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hound of Tindalos makes two claw attacks and one bite attack. It can make one tongue attack in place of its two claw attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Tongue
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

actions.name: Hunter of the Lost
actions.desc: The hound can transport itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except the hound can only affect itself, not other creatures, and can't use it to banish an unwilling creature to another plane.

creature.name: Hraesvelgr
creature.damage_immunities: cold; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creature.languages: Auran, Common, Giant (can’t speak in roc form)

special_abilities.name: Keen Sight (Roc Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: Hraesvelgr has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

special_abilities.name: Influence Weather
special_abilities.desc: Nearby weather responds to Hraesvelgr's desires. At the start of each minute, Hraesvelgr can choose to change the precipitation and wind within 3 miles of him by one stage, up or down (no action required). This effect works like the changing weather conditions aspect of the control weather spell, except Hraesvelgr can't change the temperature and the conditions change immediately.

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If Hraesvelgr fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Hraesvelgr makes one Beak attack and two Talon attacks, or he makes three Fist attacks. Alternatively, he can make three Gale Blast attacks. If two Fist attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 19 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Beak (Roc Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) piercing damage.

actions.name: Fist (Giant Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Talons (Roc Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d6 + 7) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. Hraesvelgr has two talons, each of which can grapple only one target.

actions.name: Gale Blast
actions.desc: Ranged Spell Attack: +11 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) cold damage.

actions.name: Swallow (Roc Form Only)
actions.desc: Hraesvelgr makes one Beak attack against a Large or smaller creature he is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside Hraesvelgr, and it takes 17 (5d6) acid damage at the start of each of Hraesvelgr's turns. Hraesvelgr can have only one creature swallowed at a time.

actions.name: Sudden Gust (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Hraesvelgr unleashes a powerful gust of wind in a 60-foot line that is 10 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a DC 19 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 63 (18d6) bludgeoning damage and is pushed up to 15 feet away from Hraesvelgr. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed.

legendary_actions.name: Attack
legendary_actions.desc: Hraesvelgr makes a Fist or Talons attack.

legendary_actions.name: Move
legendary_actions.desc: Hraesvelgr moves up to his speed, or flies up to half his flying speed if in roc form, without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary_actions.name: Ear-Splitting Screech (Costs 2 Actions; Roc Form Only)
legendary_actions.desc: Hraesvelgr lets out an ear-splitting screech. Each creature within 30 feet of Hraesvelgr must succeed on a DC 19 Constitution saving throw or take 14 (4d6) thunder damage and be deafened until the end of its next turn.

bonus_actions.name: Change Shape
bonus_actions.desc: Hraesvelgr transforms into a roc or back into his true form, which is a Giant. His statistics, other than his speed, are the same in each form. Any equipment he is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. He reverts to his true form if he dies.

bonus_actions.name: Attack
bonus_actions.desc: Hraesvelgr makes a Fist or Talons attack.

bonus_actions.name: Move
bonus_actions.desc: Hraesvelgr moves up to his speed, or flies up to half his flying speed if in roc form, without provoking opportunity attacks.

bonus_actions.name: Ear-Splitting Screech (Costs 2 Actions; Roc Form Only)
bonus_actions.desc: Hraesvelgr lets out an ear-splitting screech. Each creature within 30 feet of Hraesvelgr must succeed on a DC 19 Constitution saving throw or take 14 (4d6) thunder damage and be deafened until the end of its next turn.

creature.name: Hulking Whelp
creature.damage_resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

special_abilities.name: Frightened Anger (Hulking Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: The hulking whelp has disadvantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects that reduce strong emotions, such as the calm emotions spell.

special_abilities.name: Pacify (Hulking Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: A friendly creature that has interacted peacefully with the hulking whelp in its whelp form can try to calm it by speaking firmly and persuasively. The hulking whelp must be able to hear the creature, who must take an action to make a DC 15 Charisma (Persuasion) check. If the check succeeds, the hulking whelp transforms back into its whelp form on its next turn and stops attacking. If the hulking whelp takes damage before then, it remains in its hulking form and continues attacking.

special_abilities.name: Unleashed Emotion (Hulking Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: On each of the hulking whelp's turns, it attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the hulking whelp attacks an object, with preference for an object smaller than itself. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack for two turns in a row, the hulking whelp uses Change Shape to return to its whelp form and stops attacking.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hulking whelp makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

reactions.name: Defensive Transformation (Whelp Form Only)
reactions.desc: When the hulking whelp is hit with an attack or when a creature it can see or hear within 30 feet of it threatens to harm it, it must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or transform into its hulking canine form (see the Change Shape bonus action).

bonus_actions.name: Change Shape
bonus_actions.desc: The hulking whelp transforms into a Huge, hulking canine or back into its true whelp form, which is Fey. Its statistics, other than its size and creature type, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

creature.name: Hundun
creature.damage_resistances: lightning, radiant, thunder; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creature.condition_immunities: blinded, charmed, deafened, exhaustion, frightened, prone, stunned, unconscious
creature.senses: blindsight 60 ft. (blind beyond this radius), passive Perception 19
creature.languages: understands Celestial and Primordial, but can’t speak intelligibly

special_abilities.name: Inscrutable
special_abilities.desc: The hundun is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the hundun's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The hundun has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Radiant Fists
